'''mafïfchïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnophile|arachnophile]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnophile|arachnophile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| mafïfchïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mæfïfchïfth || mæfïfchïfj || mæfïfchïfsh || mæfïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || mafïffïfchïfth || mafïffïfchïfj || mafïffïfchïfsh || mafïffïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || mafïfchïfth || mafïfchïfj || mafïfchïfsh || mafïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || mafïffchïffth || mafïffchïffj || mafïffchïffsh || mafïffchïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || mafïfchïfïf || mafïfchïfïf || mafïfchïfïf || mafïfchïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || mafïfchïfth || mafïfchïfj || mafïfchïfsh || mafïfchïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || mafïfchïfïfl || mafïfchïfïfl || mafïfchïfïfl || mafïfchïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || mafïfchïfïfïf || mafïfchïfïfïf || mafïfchïfïfïf || mafïfchïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || mafïfchïfïfn || mafïfchïfïfn || mafïfchïfïfn || mafïfchïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || mafïfchïfïforo || mafïfchïfïforo || mafïfchïfïforo || mafïfchïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
